disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Reliever (blue salbutamol puffer) used approximately 6 times in the last 2 hours with minimal relief
trigger_question_examples: Have you used your reliever puffer tonight, and is it helping?
How many times have you needed the blue puffer, and how much does it help?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've used the blue puffer about six times in the last couple of hours and it's barely doing anything — normally it settles it but tonight it just isn't working.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Fast, laboured breathing with an audible expiratory whistle and a tight chest, and a sense of not getting a full breath
trigger_question_examples: What is your breathing like right now?
Does your chest feel tight, and can you take a full breath?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My breathing is fast and it's hard work — my chest feels tight like a band and I can hear a whistle when I breathe out. I feel like I can't get a full breath in.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute worsening this evening following a strong industrial chemical odour and a week of increased local flaring
trigger_question_examples: What was happening just before this got worse tonight?
Has anything in your environment changed recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's been way more of that chemical smell from the plant this week, and tonight it got really strong — that's when the coughing and the tight chest got bad.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Widespread burning, intensely itchy red rash with raw scratched areas on forearms, neck and face
trigger_question_examples: Can you tell me about the rash — where is it and what does it feel like?
Is your skin itchy, burning, or broken anywhere?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My arms, neck and face are covered in red raw patches — they burn and itch so much I keep scratching them until they're broken.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No tongue, lip or throat swelling and no trouble swallowing (pertinent negative screening for upper-airway involvement)
trigger_question_examples: Is your tongue, lips or throat swelling at all?
Any trouble swallowing or a feeling your throat is closing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my tongue and lips aren't swollen and I can swallow okay — it's more the coughing and not being able to get a proper breath.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Marked anxiety and fear about the safety of the local air and water, with a sense of being neglected by authorities
trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling in yourself with all of this?
Is anything else worrying you tonight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm honestly terrified — the air and water round here don't feel safe and nobody in charge seems to care. It's been wearing me down for years.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Multi-year history of recurring cough, chest tightness and skin irritation the patient attributes to living near the industrial area
trigger_question_examples: Has this kind of thing happened before?
How long have you had breathing or skin trouble like this?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It comes and goes — I've had breathing and skin flare-ups for a few years now and I'm sure it's from where I live, but no one has ever really sorted it out.
